name_en: Balenciaga's key Hourglass bag for this season. The unique, iconic curved silhouette is highly recognizable and eye-catching. It features a smooth, flat surface with a crescent moon shape and a metal B-shaped pull tab. The embossed cowhide texture is stylish and chic. Size: 25.5x6x16cm Model No: 8084
